raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I booked airfare with XXXX. I have the barclays XXXX credit card and was told part of my benefits would include 2 free checked bags. The airline kept trying to charge me. I made a call on XX/XX/XXXX and spoke with an person XXXX who told me to present my frontier barclays card at the airport when i check my bag to receive the free bag. I did just that in XXXX. The airline told me no you have to pay for it and contact the credit card. Ok i did that. I called while i was in the airport and filed a dispute on the card. They gave me reference. Number XXXX and was told the dispute charge was filed. A while later i had not heard and called again. They then gave me a website to file dispute which i did. I think this was in XXXX. I forgot all about it until XXXX and they gave me another reference number XXXX. Now they send a letter saying i waited too long. I have been passed back and forth andwasted 8-10 hours on their lies. This is very disappointing.
